text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... I... won?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! You did it, Taishiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (The crowd is so loud.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (I'm so... tired.)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite winning the Derby, it seems<n>Narita Taishin
completely exhausted<n>herself battling against her
rivals.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Well, nothing's too out of the<n>ordinary. It looks like
she just<n>overexerted herself.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
With a little rest, she should regain
consciousness—oh, looks like I spoke<n>too soon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Was I asleep?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Stop freaking out...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text: How's your body feel? Are you<n>dizzy?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh. No, I'm fine. Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
That's good, then. Make sure you<n>take it easy
and rest up.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Okay...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After the doctor leaves, a whirlwind<n>blows into the
room.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! Taishiiiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Guh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin, Taishin, Taishin! Y-y-youcollasped! I can't believe youcollaaasped!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Are you all right, Taishin? What did<n>the doctor
say?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah—I'm fine. You guys worry<n>too much.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'm glad... I assume you're still<n>planning to
run in the Kikuka Sho,<n>then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Duh. Was there any doubt?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Good. There's something you should<n>know, then.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Next time, it's my turn.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Hayahide's not playing around!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
And I'm... I'm not gonna back down<n>in the Kikuka
Sho either, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It sucks really bad that you stolethe Derby from me, and I'm so, sooomad!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But I'm gonna turn this anger into<n>energy! And
I'm gonna use it to run<n>as fast as lightning down
the track!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! The Kikuka Sho will be<n>miiiiine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Oh, sure. Just barge in here, make<n>some grand
declarations, and leave...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (For some reason...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (They look almost... radiant.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I told you I'm fine! Come on, let's go<n>already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Listen up—you'd better not go easy<n>on me during
training tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I catch you holding back on me, I'm<n>gonna
launch you into another galaxy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: The Kikuka Sho's gonna be mine!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The finale of the Triple Crown tour,<n>the Kikuka Sho,
awaits us next.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin reaffirms her dedication<n>to keep
pushing on, so she can<n>surpass her two rivals.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: All that matters is that I win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: As long as I keep winning, then one<n>day...
